artifact_tuixue_online: tuixue.online is a website that monitors U.S. visa appointment availability for international applicants. Public-utility websites are interesting case studies for separating human-reach from LLM-corpus reach: a site can have many users but low LLM recognition if its name doesn't co-travel into training corpora.
